query:
UPDATE eve_character SET is_main = TRUE
        WHERE id = (
            SELECT id FROM eve_character
            WHERE account_id = $1
            ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
            LIMIT 1
        )
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM eve_character
            WHERE account_id = $1 AND is_main = TRUE
        )
        RETURNING eve_character_id, name
